title: MacBook Air M3 - The Student's Dream Machine

scenes.speaker: ankita
scenes.text: Guys! I finally saved up and bought the MacBook Air M3! Six months of tutoring money, but oh my God, it was so worth it!

scenes.speaker: vikram
scenes.text: Ankita, you could have bought a Windows laptop for half the price. HP, Dell, so many options are there no?

scenes.speaker: ankita
scenes.text: Vikram, my last HP laptop used to sound like a helicopter during video calls! My professor once asked if I was calling from an airport! This MacBook? Silent. Zero noise. Not even a fan inside!

scenes.speaker: vikram
scenes.text: No fan? Then it must overheat like crazy no?

scenes.speaker: ankita
scenes.text: That's the beauty of the M3 chip! It's so efficient, it doesn't even need a fan. I run Figma, VS Code, Chrome with twenty tabs, and Spotify, all at the same time. Not even warm. My old laptop would have caught fire by now.

scenes.speaker: deepa
scenes.text: What about the battery? I'm a teacher and I need something that lasts the whole school day without charging.

scenes.speaker: ankita
scenes.text: Deepa ma'am, this is the best part! Eighteen hours of battery life! I charge it at night, and it lasts the entire next day! I haven't even unpacked the charger from my bag in two weeks!

scenes.speaker: vikram
scenes.text: Okay okay, but the display? My Dell has a 4K screen. Can Apple match that?

scenes.speaker: ankita
scenes.text: Liquid Retina display, Vikram! The colors are so accurate that my design professor thought I was showing her work on an external monitor! And it weighs only 1.24 kg! My textbook weighs more than this laptop!

scenes.speaker: deepa
scenes.text: That weight is impressive! I carry my laptop to school every day, my shoulder is paining from my current one. How much does it cost?

scenes.speaker: ankita
scenes.text: Starting at 1,14,900 rupees. Yes, it's not cheap. But with student discount you get around 10,000 off! Plus this thing will easily last 6 to 7 years. My senior is still using a 2018 MacBook Air!

scenes.speaker: vikram
scenes.text: Ankita, can you send me the Apple education store link? Asking for a friend obviously.

scenes.speaker: ankita
scenes.text: Ha! Another one converted! Link in the description everyone! If you're a student, a teacher, or anyone who wants a laptop that just works, the MacBook Air M3 is it! Subscribe for more honest reviews! Bye!
